description: Andrew began his career as a graduate at Magnox in the late 1990s. After a period in the private sector, he rejoined in 2019 as the Site Director at Harwell and Winfrith. Prior to this, Andrew worked for Rolls-Royce, where he held senior positions including Executive Vice President – UK Civil Nuclear, Vice President – Small Modular Reactors (SMR), and Operations Director. In these roles, he led business strategy and support services related to the existing UK reactor fleet, new nuclear build, and the defence sector. Before his tenure at Rolls-Royce, Andrew held various management roles at AMEC Plc, focusing on business growth, project and programme management, and corporate strategy development.

details.body:
Andrew began his career as a graduate at Magnox in the late 1990s. After a period in the private sector, he rejoined in 2019 as the Site Director at Harwell and Winfrith. Prior to this, Andrew worked for Rolls-Royce, where he held senior positions including Executive Vice President – UK Civil Nuclear, Vice President – Small Modular Reactors (SMR), and Operations Director. In these roles, he led business strategy and support services related to the existing UK reactor fleet, new nuclear build, and the defence sector.

Before his tenure at Rolls-Royce, Andrew held various management roles at AMEC Plc, focusing on business growth, project and programme management, and corporate strategy development.

Andrew began his career as a graduate at Magnox in the late 1990s. After a period in the private sector, he rejoined in 2019 as the Site Director at Harwell and Winfrith. Prior to this, Andrew worked for Rolls-Royce, where he held senior positions including Executive Vice President – UK Civil Nuclear, Vice President – Small Modular Reactors (SMR), and Operations Director. In these roles, he led business strategy and support services related to the existing UK reactor fleet, new nuclear build, and the defence sector.

Before his tenure at Rolls-Royce, Andrew held various management roles at AMEC Plc, focusing on business growth, project and programme management, and corporate strategy development.
The Future Missions Director is a developmental role, playing a leading position in Nuclear Restoration Services.

role.title: Managing Director NRS AGR & Paired Sites

title: Andy Munro
